meaning: n.加尔贡硬水软化剂(六偏磷酸钠的商标名,用于制革业等)
examples: Calgon Carbon Engineered Solutions offers oxidation and disinfection technologies that use medium pressure ultraviolet light to purify water.
Headquartered in Pittsburgh, US, Calgon Carbon Corporation has 16 manufacturing facilities in 6 countries13 sales offices in 6 countries. the company owns 240 patents.
Nor is it inflicting a "Calgon-moment" on systems that have inevitably become calcified over the years.
